# Avalon Atlas vX.Y.Z

Windows portable release.

## Download

Download `avalon-atlas-vX.Y.Z-portable.zip`, extract it, then run `avalon-atlas.exe`.

## Highlights

- 

## Package Contents

- `avalon-atlas.exe`
- `config.json`
- `static/` map data, map previews, and UI assets
- `binaries/` bundled Tesseract runtime
- `logs/`

## Notes

Avalon Atlas is an unofficial community tool for Albion Online. It does not require game account credentials and OCR runs locally.
